descriptions.text: Gunple: Gunman's Proof (ガンプル Gunman's Proof Gunman's Proof Ganpuru?) is a 1997 Japanese video game for the  Super Famicom. It was developed by Lenar and published by ASCII. It was one of the latest releases for the Super Famicom, and was never released outside of Japan. It is a 2D top down action-adventure video game set in the American Wild West that incorporates some science fiction elements.
